title: GMS Week 29 - BLOCKADE RETURNS, TOLL RISES
section_path: GMS Week 29 - BLOCKADE RETURNS, TOLL RISES
section_path_text: GMS Week 29 - BLOCKADE RETURNS, TOLL RISES
summary:
Main
The second act arrived with a name this time, and it was not "ceasefire." Five consecutive days of American strikes through Wednesday hit Iranianpositions from Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island to Sirik, while Washington reinstated the naval blockade of Iranian ports lifted during June's interim peace. The blockade found its first target within a day. A Curaçao-flagged tanker bound for Kharg Island ignored repeated warnings and was disabled by a Hellfire strike into its smokestack, stopping the vessel without spilling its cargo.
